item.title: AWS Bedrock Added OpenAI GPT-5.4 And GPT-5.5 In US East N. Virginia
item.description: AWS announced OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.5 availability on Amazon Bedrock in US East (N. Virginia), expanding regional Bedrock access for OpenAI model workloads through the Responses API.

item.title: Google Cloud Listed Gemini And Embedding Model Lifecycle Dates
item.description: Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.

item.title: Anthropic Set Fable 5 Free Access Window And Usage Credit Requirement
item.description: Anthropic's June 9 announcement says Claude Fable 5 is available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plan users, with Max, Team, and Enterprise access included through June 22, 2026 and usage credits required starting June 23, 2026.

item.title: Anthropic Introduced Claude Mythos 5 For Trusted Access
item.description: Anthropic's June 9 announcement introduced Claude Mythos 5 with a 1M-token context window, 128k maximum output tokens, adaptive thinking, and approval-gated API availability for Project Glasswing participants and trusted partners.

item.title: Anthropic Listed Fable 5 Tokenizer, Fallback Billing, And Retention Constraints
item.description: Anthropic's June 9 Claude Platform release notes say Claude Fable 5 uses the Opus 4.7 tokenizer family, adds refusal and fallback handling semantics, and requires 30-day data retention on the Claude API.

item.title: Anthropic Launched Claude Fable 5 On The Claude API
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Platform release notes list Claude Fable 5 on the Claude API with the claude-fable-5 model id, a default 1M token context window, 128k maximum output tokens, and always-on adaptive thinking.

item.title: AWS Added Claude Fable 5 Availability Through Bedrock And Claude Platform On AWS
item.description: AWS announced Claude Fable 5 availability through Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS, expanding AWS-hosted access for Anthropic's long-running coding and knowledge-work model family.

item.title: Anthropic Scheduled Claude Opus 4.1 API Retirement For August 2026
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Platform release notes announced deprecation of claude-opus-4-1-20250805 and scheduled Claude API retirement for August 5, 2026, with migration guidance toward newer Opus models.

item.title: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Added Interactive Shells
item.description: AWS announced interactive shells for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime, adding a WebSocket terminal API for running agent sessions and documenting a ten-shell concurrency cap per agent runtime.

item.title: AWS Bedrock Console Added OpenAI And Anthropic-Compatible API Workflow
item.description: AWS announced a redesigned Bedrock console workflow for the bedrock-mantle endpoint, surfacing OpenAI Responses, OpenAI Chat Completions, and Anthropic Messages compatible API usage through Bedrock projects.

item.title: OpenAI Image API Requests Returned 401 Errors
item.description: OpenAI status recorded a resolved degraded-performance incident where Image API requests returned 401 errors, affecting API users during the incident window.

item.title: OpenAI Codex Compaction Had Increased Latency
item.description: OpenAI status recorded a resolved degraded-performance incident for increased Codex compaction latency affecting a subset of users.

item.title: AWS Step Functions Added AgentCore-Powered Agentic Reasoning Step
item.description: AWS announced an AWS Step Functions integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for agentic reasoning steps, including per-invocation model/tool overrides, workflow history, and separate Step Functions plus Bedrock/AgentCore cost surfaces.

item.title: AWS Bedrock Added OpenAI GPT-5.4 In AWS GovCloud US-West
item.description: AWS announced OpenAI GPT-5.4 availability on Amazon Bedrock in AWS GovCloud US-West, expanding regulated-region deployment options for OpenAI model workloads through Bedrock.

item.title: Anthropic Reported Elevated Errors on Opus 4.7
item.description: Anthropic status recorded a resolved incident for elevated errors on Opus 4.7 affecting Claude product and developer surfaces.

item.title: Anthropic Reported Degraded Claude Code Services
item.description: Anthropic status recorded a resolved incident where some Claude Code services were degraded, including review, routine, and web-session surfaces.

item.title: Anthropic Added Tool max_tokens And No-Output Refusal Billing Relief
item.description: Anthropic's June 2 Claude Platform release notes list a tool-level max_tokens cap for output control and state that no-output refusal responses on the Claude API are no longer billed.

item.title: OpenAI Deprecated Older GPT Image Model IDs For December 2026 Shutdown
item.description: OpenAI's deprecations page records older GPT Image model IDs as deprecated, with API removal scheduled for December 1, 2026 and GPT Image 2 listed as the replacement target.

item.title: OpenAI Added Codex Role Plugins, Sites, And Annotations
item.description: OpenAI announced Codex role-specific plugins, Sites preview, and annotations, expanding Codex from coding workflows into broader workspace and knowledge-work automation.

item.title: Google Gemini API Shut Down Gemini 2.0 Flash Models
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog records the June 1, 2026 shutdown of Gemini 2.0 Flash and Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite model IDs on the Gemini API surface.

item.title: OpenAI Frontier Models And Codex Became Available On AWS
item.description: OpenAI announced general availability of OpenAI frontier models and Codex on AWS, adding an AWS procurement, governance, and deployment channel for affected customers.

item.title: Google Vertex AI Retires Gemini 2.0 Flash Stable Models
item.description: Google Vertex AI model-version documentation lists Gemini 2.0 Flash stable model IDs with a June 1, 2026 retirement date and points developers toward newer Gemini stable models.

item.title: Google Gemini API Deprecated Gemini Image Preview Models
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog deprecated Gemini image preview model IDs and gave a June 25, 2026 shutdown date, creating a migration deadline for image-generation and multimodal workflows.

item.title: Anthropic Added Opus 4.8 Dynamic Workflows And Effort Controls
item.description: Anthropic announced Claude Opus 4.8 with Claude Code dynamic workflows, effort controls, expanded long-running agent behavior, and cheaper fast mode for affected users.

item.title: Google Gemini API Shut Down Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog records the shutdown of the Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite preview model and directs developers to the generally available Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite model.

item.title: Google Gemini API Released Gemini 3.5 Flash And Managed Agents Preview
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog listed Gemini 3.5 Flash as generally available and introduced Managed Agents in public preview, adding a Google-hosted agent runtime option for Gemini API developers.

item.title: Google Gemini API Released Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite And Deprecated Preview
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog listed Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite as generally available and announced the Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite preview deprecation and May 25, 2026 shutdown date.

item.title: Google Gemini API Announced Interactions API Schema Cutover
item.description: Google Gemini API changelog announced a breaking Interactions API request/response schema cutover, with a new default schema on May 26, 2026 and legacy schema removal on June 8, 2026.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT Realtime 2.0, Translate, And Whisper Concept Coverage
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for May 2026 point to GPT Realtime 2.0 preview, GPT Realtime Translate, and GPT Realtime Whisper concept coverage for low-latency audio translation and transcription workflows.

item.title: OpenAI Scheduled Legacy GPT And Codex Snapshot Retirements For July And October 2026
item.description: OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-Realtime-1.5 And GPT-Audio-1.5
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for February 2026 list GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 availability for existing chat-completion API usage in Microsoft Foundry.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-Image-1.5 And December Audio Model Updates
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes list GPT-image-1.5 availability plus December 2025 transcription, realtime-mini, and text-to-speech model updates for API-only audio and image workflows.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added Realtime SIP, GPT-4o Diarization, And GPT-Image-1-Mini
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for October 2025 list Realtime API SIP support, GPT-4o transcribe diarization, and GPT-image-1-mini global deployment availability.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-5-Codex And Sora Video-To-Video Support
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for September 2025 list GPT-5-Codex availability and Sora video-to-video support, affecting coding-agent model access and video generation workflows on Azure.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-5 Models, Realtime Audio GA, And Model Router GPT-5 Support
item.description: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for August 2025 list GPT-5 family availability, GPT RealTime and Audio general availability, provisioned spillover GA, and model-router support for GPT-5 series models.

item.title: Anthropic Launches Claude 3.7 Sonnet
item.description: Anthropic launched Claude 3.7 Sonnet across its developer platform and partner cloud surfaces, adding a model option with standard and extended-thinking modes.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Retired 2025 Legacy And Preview Model IDs
item.description: Microsoft Learn lists Azure OpenAI 2025 retirements for legacy and preview model IDs including davinci-002, DALL-E 2, GPT-35 Turbo variants, GPT-4 snapshots, GPT-4.5 preview, GPT-4o realtime preview, and o1-preview.

item.title: Amazon Bedrock Adds Prompt Caching Preview
item.description: AWS announced a preview of Amazon Bedrock prompt caching, allowing supported models and regions to reuse repeated prompt content and change token-processing cost behavior.

item.title: Azure OpenAI Retires Legacy GPT-3 Model IDs
item.description: Microsoft Learn lists legacy Azure OpenAI GPT-3, Codex, and first-generation embedding model IDs as retired, with replacement guidance for newer instruct and embedding models.

item.title: OpenAI Retires Older GPT-3 Completions Models
item.description: OpenAI retired older GPT-3 completions-era model IDs and first-generation embedding models, requiring applications that still referenced those IDs to migrate to replacement models.
